help.full_text:
## astrbot-plugin-engram
v1.4.x - Hippocampus-like long-term memory framework

/recall <query>                                   recall related memories (default hybrid)
/mem help                                         show this help
/mem model                                        list current + available models
/mem model use embedding <n>                      switch embedding provider
/mem model use llm <n>                            switch llm provider
/mem rebuild                                      manually rebuild all embeddings
/mem prospective                                  list pending triggers
/mem stats                                        store statistics
/mem forget <id>                                  delete engram (supports id prefix match)
/mem search <q> [--mode=vector|fts|hybrid|dual]  explicit recall mode (dual=two-route RRF)
/mem export <path>                                export store to JSON
/mem import <path>                                import from JSON (run /mem rebuild after)
/mem graph <entity>                               pull entity + relations + source engrams
/mem cluster <id>                                 show engram's similar_to cluster (DG separation)
/mem narrative <topic>                            weave an autobiographical narrative on entity/topic
/mem replay                                      manually trigger SWR replay (with decay/GC/promote)
/mem valence                                     emotion valence histogram
/mem streams                                     what / where+when two-stream breakdown
/mem profile [actor]                              view / build user self-model (v1.1)
/mem activate <seed1> [seed2 ...]                 spreading activation network (v1.1)
/mem remember <predicate> <value> [actor]         manually write a self-model fact (v1.1)
/mem cluster-list                                 list generated cluster summaries (v1.1)
/mem confidence <query>                           recall with metamemory confidence (v1.2)
/mem decaycurve [id|all]                          forgetting-curve visualization (v1.2)
/mem consolidate                                  manually trigger consolidation (incl. episodic->semantic, v1.2)
